mapper.sql: select c.company_record_id, c.external_company_id, c.external_company_name, c.number_prefix, c.manual_confirmed_name, c.org_path, c.parent_external_company_id, c.sync_status, c.first_source_type, c.sdk_observed, c.manual_created, c.manual_created_by, c.manual_created_time, c.record_status, c.merged_to_company_record_id, c.merged_to_external_company_id, c.first_seen_time, c.last_seen_time, c.last_source_dept_id, d.dept_name as last_source_dept_name, m.dept_id as mapped_dept_id, md.dept_name as mapped_dept_name, c.remark, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time from fe_external_company c left join sys_dept d on c.last_source_dept_id = d.dept_id left join fe_company_dept_mapping m on c.external_company_id = m.external_company_id left join sys_dept md on m.dept_id = md.dept_id
mapper.insert: insert into fe_external_company ( external_company_id, external_company_name, manual_confirmed_name, number_prefix, org_path, parent_external_company_id, sync_status, first_source_type, sdk_observed, manual_created, manual_created_by, manual_created_time, record_status, merged_to_company_record_id, merged_to_external_company_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, last_source_dept_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{externalCompanyId}, #{externalCompanyName}, #{manualConfirmedName}, #{numberPrefix}, #{orgPath}, #{parentExternalCompanyId}, #{syncStatus}, #{firstSourceType}, #{sdkObserved}, #{manualCreated}, #{manualCreatedBy}, #{manualCreatedTime}, #{recordStatus}, #{mergedToCompanyRecordId}, #{mergedToExternalCompanyId}, #{firstSeenTime}, #{lastSeenTime}, #{lastSourceDeptId}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
